name: add-audio-reactive-effects-to-20260406-0440
idea: Add audio-reactive effects to the video editor. Effects should be able to respond to audio data (frequency bins, amplitude, beat detection) from a blended mix of all audio tracks in the timeline. This must integrate with the existing effects infrastructure: the DynamicEffectRegistry, the compileEffect.tsx runtime compilation (inject audio hooks as new globals alongside useCurrentFrame/interpolate/etc), the effectPromptTemplate.ts (so AI-generated effects can use audio data), and the ParameterControls system (new audio-binding parameter type). Key integration points: (1) Audio analysis layer that extracts frequency/amplitude/beat data from a mixed-down version of all timeline audio tracks, synchronized to Remotion's frame clock. (2) A useAudioReactive() hook (or similar) injected into compiled custom effects via the new Function() call in compileEffect.tsx. (3) Updated effectPromptTemplate.ts documenting the new audio globals. (4) The continuous effect category is the primary target but entrance/exit effects should also be able to use audio data. (5) Preview support in EffectCreatorPanel.tsx. The existing effect wrapping pipeline (wrapWithEffect/wrapWithClipEffects in effects/index.tsx -> VisualClip.tsx -> EffectLayerSequence.tsx) should remain unchanged - audio data flows through the hook, not through props.

last_gate.rationale: The plan's architecture is sound and the v1→v2 revision resolved all 11 structural gaps (AnalyserNode→manual FFT, edge function scope, type widening, useAudioParam resolution path, preview placement). The remaining 10 flags are implementation-detail precision issues and test coverage gaps, not architectural problems. The score is trending down (21.5→16.5), no recurring critiques, and further iteration would produce diminishing returns — the executor can handle these details with the warnings below. The three correctness flags about delayRender/cancelRender lifecycle are the most important and are explicitly resolved.
last_gate.signals_assessment: Iteration 2, weighted score 21.5→16.5 (improving). Plan delta 65.3% shows substantial revision that resolved 11 of the original 18 flags. Remaining 10 flags cluster into delayRender lifecycle details (3), UI component choice (3), test coverage precision (3), and useAudioParam implementation (1). No recurring critiques across iterations. Preflight all green. No overlap with escalated debt subsystems — the video-editor-effect-registry debt is about render-time module mutation, orthogonal to this plan's context-based audio injection.
warnings: CRITICAL: Do NOT use cancelRender() for unmount cleanup — it aborts the render with an error. Instead, call continueRender(handle) on unmount if analysis hasn't completed yet. This is a safe no-op if already called.

Acquire the delayRender handle synchronously via useState initializer — `useState(() => delayRender('Audio analysis'))` — not in a useEffect. This matches Remotion's own pattern and prevents initial-frame races.
useAudioParam should use plain arithmetic `value * (max - min) + min` instead of importing Remotion's interpolate. No external dependency needed.
Use two NumberInput controls for audio-binding min/max — the shared Slider component is scalar-only and cannot render dual thumbs.

The edge function test suite (index.test.ts) mocks buildGenerateEffectMessages, so it won't validate templates.ts content directly. Consider adding a simple smoke test that imports templates.ts and asserts AVAILABLE_GLOBALS includes the new hooks.

settled_decisions.decision: Audio data flows through React context + useAudioReactive() hook. wrapWithEffect/wrapWithClipEffects/EffectComponentProps remain untouched.
settled_decisions.rationale: Settled in gate v1, reconfirmed. Keeps effect wrapping pipeline unchanged.

settled_decisions.decision: EffectCreatorPanel preview uses SyntheticAudioProvider inside makePreviewComposition's returned component. No real audio file picker for v1.
settled_decisions.rationale: Caller props (previewAssetSrc, timelineFps) don't change. Synthetic data is synchronous — no delayRender needed in preview.

settled_decisions.decision: Use OfflineAudioContext to render mixed audio, then manually slice AudioBuffer into frame-sized windows for RMS/band-energy/FFT. No AnalyserNode.
settled_decisions.rationale: AnalyserNode doesn't work deterministically in offline contexts. Manual slicing gives frame-exact data.

settled_decisions.decision: useAudioParam(binding) is the runtime resolution path for audio-binding parameters. Effects receive AudioBindingValue in params and call useAudioParam() to get a frame-synchronized number.
settled_decisions.rationale: Completes the contract: params flow unchanged through wrapWithEffect, effects opt in to audio binding resolution via the injected helper.

settled_decisions.decision: Audio-binding parameter UI uses a Select for source and two NumberInput controls for min/max. Not a dual-thumb Slider.
settled_decisions.rationale: The shared Slider component is scalar-only. NumberInput is the established numeric control in the editor.

settled_decisions.decision: AudioAnalysisProvider acquires delayRender handle via useState initializer, calls continueRender when analysis completes, and calls continueRender (not cancelRender) on unmount cleanup.
settled_decisions.rationale: Matches Remotion's own IFrame pattern. cancelRender aborts with an error and must not be used for cleanup.

last_gate.orchestrator_guidance: Plan passed gate and preflight. Proceed to finalize. Verify unresolved flags against the plan and project code before accepting.
